issues.description: Condition missing: '[On Play] If the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field' requires a condition checking DON count comparison. Current condition is 'Always' but should check DonCount parity.
Action incomplete: 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it' requires two actions: AddDon/GiveDon followed by Rest. Current DSL only has GiveDon without Rest.
